data.title: CRV: At $0.37, oversold conditions signal potential recovery to $0.40-$0.46 in 2-4 weeks as Curve hits critical support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is currently being traded at a price of $0.37, with technical indicators suggesting that it is in an oversold condition. Analysts are predicting a target price range of $0.40 to $0.46 within the next 2 to 4 weeks as the cryptocurrency Curve nears critical support levels.

data.title: TON price may hit $2.00-$2.40 by February 2026. Short-term target: $1.61-$1.70; breakout level at $1.97.

The level considered for a bullish breakout is at $1.97, identified as the Upper Bollinger Band.

data.title: US banking industry prioritizes halting stablecoin yields in 2026 amid proposed crypto market regulations before midterms.
data.description: The American Bankers Association is currently focusing its efforts on addressing the issue of stablecoin yields. This has emerged as the organization's primary concern, especially as Congress aims to enact legislation on crypto market structure ahead of the upcoming midterms.

data.title: Hindustan Zinc & CIMIC Group to establish India's 1st Zinc Tailings Recycling Facility; Vedanta Group's contract with Sedgman & Leighton Asia.
data.description: In Udaipur, India, on January 23, 2026, Hindustan Zinc Limited, a company under the Vedanta Group and the top global zinc producer, revealed that it has granted contracts to CIMIC Group subsidiaries Sedgman and Leighton Asia. data.title: Antlara Dental in Turkey unveils in-house lab for dental restorations, merging digital design with expert hand finishing.
data.description: A new in-house laboratory service has been introduced by Antlara Dental in Antalya, Turkey, as of January 23, 2026. The service aims to streamline the process of creating and fitting dental restorations. By combining modern digital design and production techniques with expert hand finishing, the laboratory ensures a seamless workflow for patients. This advancement is set to enhance the overall efficiency and quality of dental services offered by Antlara Dental.

data.title: Analysts project SUI to reach $2.00-$2.42 in Feb, currently trading at $1.51 with potential for a rebound.
data.description: Trading at $1.51, SUI is currently experiencing bearish momentum. Despite this, analysts are maintaining February targets ranging from $2.00 to $2.42. Technical analysis indicates oversold conditions that could potentially initiate a rebound.

data.title: PwC says crypto adoption varies globally, facing diverse challenges in different regions.
data.description: According to a report by PricewaterhouseCoopers, the cryptocurrency sector is operating within a fragmented global environment, encountering diverse obstacles in various markets.
